title: Adherence follow-up after partial completion for patient user-002
starting_prompt: I only did part of my rehab activity today and I am not sure if that is okay.
conversation_plan: Answer the assistant's adherence questions naturally, mention partial completion and mild uncertainty, and stay in the conversation until the assistant saves one adherence report.
user_persona: Cooperative patient who gives details only when asked and may need reassurance.
end_when: The assistant has logged one adherence report.
